cases.acceptance_criteria: Implement a calculator module with add(a,b), subtract(a,b), multiply(a,b), divide(a,b), power(base,exp), modulo(a,b). divide() and modulo() must raise ValueError when the divisor is zero. All functions must have docstrings.
cases.notes: Complete implementation. All guards present. All 10 tests pass.

cases.acceptance_criteria: Implement a student grade calculator with get_letter_grade(score) using boundaries A+>=90, A>=85, A->=80, B+>=75, B>=70, B->=65, C+>=60, C>=55, D>=50, F otherwise. get_gpa(score) returns GPA equivalent. class_average(scores) returns the mean. All functions raise ValueError for invalid inputs including empty lists.
cases.notes: Complete implementation. Correct boundaries. All 10 tests pass.

cases.acceptance_criteria: Implement a singly linked list with insert_at_head(data), insert_at_tail(data), delete(data) returning bool, search(data) returning bool, to_list() returning a Python list, and length() returning node count. All operations must handle empty lists correctly.

Implement temperature converters: celsius_to_fahrenheit (F = C*9/5+32), fahrenheit_to_celsius (C = (F-32)*5/9), celsius_to_kelvin (K = C+273.15), kelvin_to_celsius (C = K-273.15), fahrenheit_to_kelvin. All functions must raise ValueError for temperatures below absolute zero or negative Kelvin.
cases.notes: Complete implementation. Correct formulas and validation. All 10 tests pass.

cases.acceptance_criteria: Implement a BankAccount class with __init__(owner, initial_balance=0.0) raising ValueError for negative balance, deposit(amount) raising ValueError for non-positive amounts, withdraw(amount) raising ValueError for non-positive amounts or insufficient funds, a balance property, and transaction_count() returning the number of completed transactions.
Implement a calculator with add, subtract, multiply, divide, power, modulo. divide() MUST raise ValueError (not ZeroDivisionError) when b is zero. modulo() must also safely handle zero divisors.
cases.notes: Missing zero guard in divide() — raises raw ZeroDivisionError. Core arithmetic otherwise correct. 1 test fails.

cases.acceptance_criteria: Implement get_letter_grade(score) with exact boundaries A+>=90, A>=85, A->=80, B+>=75, B>=70, B->=65, C+>=60, C>=55, D>=50, F otherwise. Scores 50-54 MUST return D. Input validation required.
cases.notes: Dead branch: D condition uses >=55 instead of >=50. Scores 50-54 return F incorrectly. 1 boundary test fails.

cases.acceptance_criteria: Implement a linked list where search(data) correctly finds values anywhere in the list including the head node. All traversal must start at self.head and check before advancing.
cases.notes: search() advances current before checking — skips the head node. Logic error in traversal order. Insert, delete, length all work correctly.

cases.acceptance_criteria: Implement temperature converters with correct formulas. kelvin_to_celsius(k) MUST raise ValueError for negative Kelvin. celsius_to_kelvin(c) and celsius_to_fahrenheit(c) MUST raise ValueError for inputs below absolute zero (-273.15C). Validation is mandatory.
cases.notes: All formulas correct but no input validation. 2 validation tests fail.

cases.acceptance_criteria: Implement BankAccount where withdraw(amount) raises ValueError when the withdrawal amount exceeds the current balance. Overdraft must be prevented.
cases.notes: No overdraft check — allows negative balance. 1 test fails. All other features work.

cases.acceptance_criteria: Implement a calculator where multiply(a,b) returns a*b, divide(a,b) returns a/b and raises ValueError for zero divisor, power(base,exp) returns base**exp.
cases.notes: multiply returns a+b, divide returns b/a with no guard, power returns base+exp. Three functions fundamentally wrong. 5 tests fail.

cases.acceptance_criteria: Implement get_letter_grade with exact boundaries A+>=90, A>=85, A->=80, B+>=75, B>=70, B->=65, C+>=60, C>=55, D>=50. Must raise ValueError for scores outside 0-100. class_average must raise ValueError for empty list.
cases.notes: All thresholds shifted up by 5. No input validation. No empty list guard in class_average. 7 tests fail.

cases.acceptance_criteria: Implement a linked list where insert_at_head and insert_at_tail correctly update self.head so that inserted nodes are reachable via traversal.
cases.notes: insert_at_head and insert_at_tail never assign to self.head — nodes discarded. List always empty. 9 tests fail.

cases.acceptance_criteria: Implement temperature converters with correct formulas: celsius_to_fahrenheit must compute C*9/5+32, fahrenheit_to_celsius must compute (F-32)*5/9, celsius_to_kelvin must compute C+273.15.
cases.notes: All three core formulas wrong. celsius_to_fahrenheit uses *5/9, fahrenheit_to_celsius adds 32 instead of subtracting, celsius_to_kelvin subtracts 273.15. 8 tests fail.

cases.acceptance_criteria: Implement BankAccount with full validation: __init__ rejects negative initial balance, deposit rejects non-positive amounts, withdraw rejects non-positive amounts and overdrafts, transaction_count accurately tracks completed operations.
cases.notes: No validation anywhere. No overdraft protection. transaction_count always returns 0. 6 tests fail.
